name: Fallen Temple of Midgaard
description:
This once was the great temple of Midgaard before the attack of the Black
monster.  The temple has been constructed from giant marble blocks, eternal in
appearance, and most of the walls are covered by ancient wall paintings
picturing Gods, Giants and peasants.  This temple is now full of monsters and
it is said that the source of the black monster power lies in this altar.

exits.description: At the northern end of the temple hall is a statue and a huge altar.

In the east, you see a small alcove with a rickety wooden sign which
reads "Midgaard Donation Room."
You look down the huge stone steps at the temple square below.
